# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for SQS and SNS setup for serverless event processing

Resources:
  MyQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties: 
      QueueName: MyEventQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600  # 4 days
      VisibilityTimeout: 30              # 30 seconds

  MyTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MyEventTopic
      
  MyQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MyQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - SQS:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                AWS:SourceArn: !Ref MyTopic

  MySubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties: 
      TopicArn: !Ref MyTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !Ref MyQueue

  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref MyTopic
